description_long: This chair features a modern, minimalist design with a gently curved backrest and a generously padded seat, both upholstered in a muted olive-green fabric. The backrest is slightly reclined for ergonomic support and is attached to the seat with two slender, gold-colored metal rods that extend down to form the rear legs. The front legs are also made of the same gold-colored metal, giving the chair a sleek and contemporary appearance. The seat cushion is thick and appears comfortable, with a smooth, plain surface and no visible seams or patterns. The overall structure is lightweight yet sturdy, making it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, waiting areas, or public lobbies. The combination of fabric and metal materials provides both comfort and durability for frequent use.
description: A modern chair with an olive-green upholstered seat and backrest, supported by slender gold-colored metal legs. The design is sleek, comfortable, and suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the curved backrest and two gold-colored metal rods connecting the backrest to the seat and forming the rear legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the reclined backrest, thick seat cushion, and the slim profile of the gold-colored metal legs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide, plain seat and backrest, as well as the symmetrical placement of the four metal legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the ergonomic curve of the backrest and the clean lines of the frame.
